findings.description: Section s7 is missing `BulkValidator.MsgIdHolder` from hints. This inner class is referenced in the method specification: `BulkValidator.MsgIdHolder#validateWith(Class<F> formClass, String validateFor)` and is the class on which validateWith is called.
findings.source_evidence: BulkValidator.MsgIdHolder#validateWith(Class<F> formClass, String validateFor) — appears in 精査処理を実装したクラス、メソッドの指定 subsection

findings.description: Section s7 is missing `ParameterizedSqlPStatement` from hints. This class appears in both InsertionStrategy interface method signatures (`prepareStatement` and `addBatch`) in the データベース一括登録（独自実装）subsection code example.
findings.source_evidence: public ParameterizedSqlPStatement prepareStatement(UserInfoTempEntity userInfoTempEntity) and public void addBatch(ParameterizedSqlPStatement statement, UserInfoTempEntity userInfoTempEntity) in the InsertionStrategy implementation example
